description: Composition White sleeveless top made of lightweight, dobby weave 100% cotton, has a round neck, mock buttoned placket, pin-tucks on the yoke at front and lace and pin-tucks at the yoke at back Fit Regular Wash care Rinse separately Gentle handwash in mild detergent Do not bleach or scrub on embroidery & print Line dry inside out Low iron The understated colouring with updated design details, fresh from sepia's design studio, makes this top the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, leggings (or tights) and a floral scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
